claimText: The Central Pollution Control Board (CPCB) has directed State Pollution Control Boards (SPCBs) to adopt a revised classification of industries.
evidenceExcerpt: Central Pollution Control Board (CPCB) directed State Pollution Control Boards (SPCBs) to adopt revised classification of industries.
examUse: Statement-based question on the roles and directives of CPCB vs SPCBs.
distractorHooks: Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change (MoEFCC) directed SPCBs

claimText: The revised classification of industries by the CPCB introduces a new Blue category alongside the existing Red, Orange, Green, and White categories.
evidenceExcerpt: The revised classification introduces a new Blue category alongside the existing Red, Orange, Green, and White categories.
examUse: Statement-based question on the categories of industrial pollution classification.
distractorHooks: Only Red, Orange, and Green categories exist
